## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in Odinn.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm release:preflight`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] Relevant integration tests
- [ ] Cross-platform impact considered
- [ ] Security and permission impact considered
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Release impact

- [ ] No user-visible release note required
- [ ] Patch
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Additional evidence

Include logs, screenshots, benchmarks, migration notes, or failure-recovery evidence where relevant.
